<head><title>An Article</title></head>
<body>
<h1>Chapter 1: The Beginning</h1>
<p>This is the first paragraph of an article that was saved with a .txt extension by mistake.</p>

<h1>Chapter 2: The Middle</h1>
<p>Here is the second part. The sniffer should route this to the HTML parser instead of plain text.</p>

<h1>Chapter 3: The End</h1>
<p>And the closing thoughts of the piece.</p>
</body>
</html>
